name: Into the Barrow-downs
flavorIntro: A cold green light seeps from the mounds. The dead are restless, and the way runs deep before it runs to the Lord.

stages.label: The Crossing of the Downs
stages.stageFlavor: Fog and grasping fingers; the grave-damp settles in the chest. The dead are many but weak — and they whisper of the one who waits.

stages.label: The Barrow-wight Lord
stages.stageFlavor: The Lord rises in his gold and his terror. Now the dread bites in earnest — only a band that came prepared will stand.
